'''mahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaringly|glaringly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaringly|glaringly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mahate|mahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mahatesher|mahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahatesherĂ«m|mahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mahatero|mahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mahateshĂ«|mahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahateshĂ«m|mahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimahatero|gokimahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimahateshĂ«|gokimahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahateshĂ«m|gokimahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomahankerom|gomahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomahankeshĂ«|gomahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahankeshĂ«m|gomahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomahankeya|gomahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mahaterom|mahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahatemu|mahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mahateya|mahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimahaterom|gokimahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahatemu|gokimahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimahateya|gokimahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mahahate|mahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mahahatesher|mahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahahatesherĂ«m|mahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mahahatero|mahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mahahateshĂ«|mahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahahateshĂ«m|mahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimahahatero|gokimahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimahahateshĂ«|gokimahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahahateshĂ«m|gokimahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomahahankerom|gomahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomahahankeshĂ«|gomahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahahankeshĂ«m|gomahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomahahankeya|gomahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mahahaterom|mahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahahatemu|mahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mahahateya|mahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimahahaterom|gokimahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahahatemu|gokimahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimahahateya|gokimahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠte|mĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠtesher|mĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠtero|mĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠtero|gokimĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠterom|mĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠtemu|mĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠteya|mĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠterom|gokimĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠhĂŠteya|gokimĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafhafte|mafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafhaftesher|mafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafhaftesherĂ«m|mafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafhaftero|mafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafhafteshĂ«|mafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafhafteshĂ«m|mafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafhaftero|gokimafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafhafteshĂ«|gokimafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafhafteshĂ«m|gokimafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafhafnkerom|gomafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafhafnkeshĂ«|gomafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafhafnkeshĂ«m|gomafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafhafnkeya|gomafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafhafterom|mafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafhaftemu|mafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafhafteya|mafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafhafterom|gokimafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafhaftemu|gokimafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafhafteya|gokimafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
